qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 赛巴里 进球，布拉欣·迪亚斯 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Brahim Díaz (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Ché Adams.
Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Handball by John McGinn (Scotland).
Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Kieran Tierney.
Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Grant Hanley.
Attempt blocked. Ayyoub Bouaddi (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 阿尤布·布阿迪射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Issa Diop (Morocco).
Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt missed. Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco) right footed shot from the right side of the box is too high. Assisted by Brahim Díaz.
qualifiers.espnShortText: Neil El Aynaoui Shot Off Target

events.description: 尼尔·艾纳维射门偏出。 布拉欣·迪亚斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco).
Attempt missed. Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco) right footed shot from the left side of the box is too high. Assisted by Ismael Saibari.
qualifiers.espnShortText: Bilal El Khannouss Shot Off Targ

events.description: 比拉尔·艾尔·汉努斯射门偏出。 赛巴里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt missed. Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) right footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Brahim Díaz with a cross.

events.description: 阿什拉夫·哈基米射门偏出。 布拉欣·迪亚斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco).
Offside, Scotland. Grant Hanley is caught offside.
Handball by Ayyoub Bouaddi (Morocco).
Foul by Noussair Mazraoui (Morocco).
Noussair Mazraoui (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. John McGinn (Scotland) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Andy Robertson with a cross.

events.description: 约翰·麦金射门偏出。 安迪·罗伯逊参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Kieran Tierney (Scotland) left footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Ché Adams.

events.description: 基兰·蒂尔尼射门被封堵。 切·亚当斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时5分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Scotland 0, Morocco 1.
Second Half begins Scotland 0, Morocco 1.
Attempt blocked. Ismael Saibari (Morocco) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Bilal El Khannouss.

events.description: 赛巴里射门被封堵。 比拉尔·艾尔·汉努斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Jack Hendry.
Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Grant Hanley.
Attempt saved. Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco) header from a difficult angle on the right is saved in the top right corner by Angus Gunn (Scotland). Assisted by Achraf Hakimi with a cross.
qualifiers.espnShortText: Bilal El Khannouss Shot On Targe

events.description: 比拉尔·艾尔·汉努斯射正。 阿什拉夫·哈基米参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 布拉欣·迪亚斯射门被封堵。 阿泽丁·欧纳济参与进攻。

events.description: 阿什拉夫·哈基米射门偏出。 尼尔·艾纳维参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ryan Christie (Scotland) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Scott McTominay.

Baidu Sports line-statistics / ESPN Scoreboard / ESPN Summary boxscore / Local event timeline

source.name: 懂球帝
source.note: 懂球帝公开比赛概览 tendencies.data；正值为主队攻势，负值为客队攻势。

summary.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口
summary.sourceNote: 历史记录来自懂球帝 App 公开全量球队赛历（含友谊赛），并以 FIFA 公开赛事接口交叉核验；每场均保留原始来源回链。

metadata.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口

source.licenseNotice: 赛程、比分、阵容、事件和榜单来自本地 FIFA 官方公开 JSON 快照；生产展示仍需确认 FIFA 条款和授权边界。
